title: Backend Software Engineer (Remote)
description:
**Role** 
 : Backend Software Engineer (Remote)
 



**Location** 
 : Remote (Work from Anywhere)
 



**Payout:** 
 $20 \\- $70/hour
 



  





**Role Overview:** 




 Join one of our clients, a global leader in the technology industry, as a Backend Engineer for a contract, part\\-time role. You will architect and build robust, scalable backend systems powering innovative digital products. This is a fantastic opportunity for backend specialists passionate about solving complex challenges and delivering high\\-impact solutions.

 • Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend services and APIs that meet demanding performance requirements.

title: Software Engineer, .Net Fullstack
description:
**A career that’s the whole package!**
 At Conga, we’ve built a community where our colleagues can thrive. Here you’ll find opportunities to innovate and support growth through individual and team development, all within an environment where every voice is heard.
   

  

**Conga** 
 lines up commercial operations so companies run as connected, smarter businesses. By unifying the people and processes that drive commerce, Conga aligns pricing, quoting, contracting, rebates, and communications so teams stay in sync and buyers keep moving forward. The result is trusted decisions, consistent buyer experiences, and profitable growth. More than 10,000 customers worldwide, including over 50% of the Fortune 100®, trust Conga when commercial complexity is high and global impact is on the line.
   

  

**Our approach** 
 is grounded in the Conga Way, a framework that reflects our values and drives everything from hiring to decision\\-making, as well as key programs including recognition. Created with direct input from our colleagues, the Conga Way forms the foundation of our vibrant culture.
   

  

**Job Title:** 
 Software Engineer
   

  

**Location:** 
 Bangalore
   

  

**Reports to:** 
 Manager, Software Engineering
   

  

**A quick snapshot…**
 We are looking for a talented Software Engineer to help us build next gen Conga products. We want to hire unbelievably bright developers, who are a joy to work with, love to work with others, solve problems, listen well, and lead as appropriate. We believe in using the best tools for the task at hand so the ability and desire to learn new programming languages and technologies is a must. All of this adds up to an exciting, challenging, and always interesting place to work, where hard problems are found and solved every day.
   

  

**Why it’s a big deal…**
 This is one of the critical roles in the engineering team where a Software Engineer will maintain front\\-end and back\\-end aspects of application development. This role works on multiple technologies and databases to make sure the product development moves towards rapid development, rich controls, more scalable, and better security. It is a challenging role working on the latest tech stack and a dynamic \\& rewarding environment.
   

  

**Are you the person we’re looking for?**
 Front\\-end Technologies. You should have 3\\+ years of experience in Front\\-end technologies like HTML5, CSS3, JQuery, Javascript, Bootstrap, and at least 2\\+ years of experience in Angular 2\\.0 \\& above versions.
   

  

 Deployment \\& Collaboration Tools. You should have experience working with container\\-based platforms like Docker/ Kubernetes and be proficient with source control and team collaboration tools (GitHub, Jira, Microsoft teams).
   

  

 Backend Technologies. You should have hands\\-on experience in backend technologies, API, design patterns, architecture, C\\# \\& SQL Query, and good to have Microservices.
   

  

 Education. A bachelor’s degree in Engineering or equivalent.
   

  

**Here’s What Will Give You An Edge…**
 Passionate Coder. Proactive, self\\-driven, and enjoys solving complex problems, not just in the primary area of responsibility but across boundaries. Identify and implement best practices for coding as well as development processes and perform as a trusted contributor requiring little to no supervision and demonstrating the ability to meet deadlines, exceed goals, and create benchmarks for success.
   

  

 Strong communication and interpersonal skills. You’re not just comfortable engaging in collaborative discussions, but initiating them, too. You are skilled at reading and adapting to different communication styles. When you speak you are clear and concise. Your strong listening skills foster connection with our clients and allow you to accurately collect the right information so you can resolve issues in the most expedient way.
   

  

 Analytical thinker and creative problem solver. You can see issues holistically and follow the flow of the stack to get to the root of the matter \\-\\- a key skill in this role. But where you really shine is with your ability to identify creative solutions to unique customer requirements. This is critical for ensuring our customer issues are resolved in a manner that meets or exceeds their expectations without increasing their costs.
   

  

 Ability to meet deadlines. You are able to perform as a trusted contributor requiring little to no supervision and demonstrating the ability to meet deadlines, exceed goals, and create benchmarks for success.
   

  

**Did we pique your interest?**
 If this sounds like the kind of job you would love in the kind of environment where you would thrive, please click apply. We'd love to hear from you!
   

  

**Preferred Resume Format**
 We accept resumes in any format, we suggest using PDF or plain text. These formats help ensure that your resume’s formatting remains intact, making it easier for our recruiters to review your application promptly.
   

  

**Don’t meet every requirement for the role?** 


 Studies have shown that women and members of ethnic minorities are less likely to apply to jobs unless they meet every single qualification. At Conga we are dedicated to building a diverse, inclusive, and authentic workplace, so if you’re excited about this role but your experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyway. You just might be the right candidate for this or other roles.
   

  

 Additional Information
   

  

 Conga is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer and provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants regardless of race, color, religion, gender, gender identity, age, national origin, disability, parental or pregnancy status, marriage and civil partnership, sexual orientation, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We understand interviewing can be stressful for those with disabilities. If reasonable accommodation is needed to allow you to show us your best self, please let your recruiter know as soon as possible. All your information will be kept confidential according to EEO guidelines. Conga is not open to third party solicitation or resumes for our posted FTE positions. Resumes received from third party agencies that are unsolicited will be considered complimentary.
   

  

**Conga's Applicant Privacy Statement**
 The information you provide during the application process will be used in accordance with Conga’s Applicant Privacy Statement (https://conga.com/applicant\\-privacy\\-statement). By submitting your application, you acknowledge and agree to the terms outlined in this privacy statement.

title: Principal Embedded Software Engineer
description:
**About The Position: Principal Embedded Software Engineer** 




 Statcon Electronics India Limited is seeking an exceptionally skilled and experienced Principal Embedded Software Engineer to work with our Research \\& Innovation division. This is a high\\-impact, Senior\\-level role focused not only on designing and developing advanced embedded systems for power electronics products but also on driving end\\-to\\-end product deployment from concept to commercialization.
 



 The ideal candidate will possess 5\\+ years of experience in Embedded Software Development, preferably from a top\\-tier institute and candidate should also have strong experience working in startup or high\\-growth environments where ownership, agility, cross\\-functional collaboration, and hands\\-on execution are critical. We are looking for a leader who has managed multiple responsibilities simultaneously, successfully taken products from ideation to field deployment, and can build scalable, market\\-ready solutions.
 



**Note:** 
 This is a hands\\-on engineering Senior position role — we expect the leader to actively contribute to technical development, prototype validation, product testing, deployment and effectively manage teams.
 



**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Lead the end\\-to\\-end development lifecycle of embedded software and hardware systems for power electronic converters, inverters, and control systems — from research, prototyping, validation, to deployment.
* Drive product innovation initiatives within the Research \\& Innovation division, transforming ideas into commercially viable and deployable products.
* Collaborate closely with hardware, power electronics, mechanical, manufacturing, and business teams to ensure smooth transition from R\\&D to production and deployment.
* Architect, design, and optimize embedded software for microcontrollers and DSPs (STM32, Texas Instruments, PIC, etc.) with scalability and field performance in mind.
* Design and implement real\\-time embedded systems using C/C\\+\\+, RTOS, and bare\\-metal programming.
* Take ownership of firmware releases, testing, debugging, field issue resolution, and post\\-deployment optimization.
* Develop and validate communication protocols such as SPI, I2C, UART, CAN, Modbus, and implement advanced diagnostics for real\\-world industrial environments.
* Conduct feasibility studies, risk assessments, and system\\-level design reviews to ensure product reliability and time\\-to\\-market efficiency.
* Lead and mentor a growing embedded team while fostering a startup mindset — encouraging ownership, accountability, agility, and innovation.
* Integrate embedded solutions with cloud\\-based IoT platforms (AWS, Azure, MQTT) for remote monitoring, analytics, and predictive maintenance.
* Ensure compliance with product certification standards (CE, IEC, etc.), and actively participate in validation, certification, and customer acceptance processes.
* Manage documentation, version control, configuration management, and structured release cycles using tools like GitHub or Bitbucket.
* Stay abreast of global trends in embedded systems, automation, and power electronics to continuously strengthen the company’s R\\&D capabilities and competitive edge.



**Qualifications \\& Skills:** 



* B Tech in Electronics, Electrical, Embedded Systems, Computer Science or a related field from a Top Tier Institute.
* Minimum 5–8 years of experience in embedded firmware development, preferably of power electronics
* Mandatory experience working in a startup, high\\-growth company, or innovation\\-driven environment where the candidate handled multi\\-functional responsibilities and product deployments.
* Proven track record of taking products from concept, prototyping, testing, and validation to successful market deployment.
* Strong command of Embedded C/C\\+\\+, RTOS, and microcontroller\\-based development.
* Deep knowledge of power electronics systems, including converters, inverters, and motor control.
* Hands\\-on experience with STM32CubeIDE, Keil, Code Composer Studio, or similar development tools.
* Exposure to cloud connectivity, IoT protocols (MQTT, REST), and device telemetry systems.
* Experience with version control systems (GitHub, Bitbucket), CI/CD pipelines, and Agile or fast\\-iteration product development cycles.
* Strong leadership, decision\\-making, and stakeholder management skills with the ability to drive execution under tight timelines.
* Certifications in Embedded Systems, Power Electronics, IoT, or Product Development are a plus.



**What We Offer:** 



* Opportunity to lead cutting\\-edge R\\&D in embedded systems and power electronics.
* Competitive compensation and performance\\-based incentives.
* Exposure to national and international projects with advanced tech stacks.
* A modern and collaborative work environment that values innovation and continuous learning.



 Statcon Electronics and Statcon Powtech are Equal Opportunity Employers and consider applicants for all positions without regard to race, color, religion or belief, age, marital status, military/veteran status, genetic information, sexual orientation, gender identity, physical or mental disability, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws.

title: Machine Learning Software Developer (Remote)
description:
* **Role** 
 : Machine Learning Software Developer (Remote)
* **Location** 
 : Remote (Work from Anywhere)
* **Payout** 
 : $30 \\- $100 /hour



  





**Role Overview:** 




 Join one of our clients, a global leader in the Artificial Intelligence industry, as a skilled Machine Learning Engineer working on a contract basis. This role involves leveraging advanced technical skills to design, develop, and optimize state\\-of\\-the\\-art machine learning models. You will play a pivotal role in solving complex data challenges, collaborating closely with cross\\-functional stakeholders, and driving impactful results in a fully remote environment. This is a contractor position.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




 • Develop and train machine learning models using TensorFlow and Scikit\\-learn to address real\\-world business problems.
 



 • Conduct comprehensive data preprocessing, including data cleaning, transformation, and feature engineering to ensure high\\-quality inputs for model development.
 



 • Collaborate with data scientists, data engineers, and business analysts to understand requirements and translate them into scalable ML solutions.
 



 • Continuously monitor, evaluate, and optimize machine learning models to ensure they meet performance and business objectives.
 



 • Conduct thorough analysis and provide actionable insights to stakeholders on model performance and areas for improvement.
 



  





**Required Skills \\& Qualifications:** 




 • Advanced knowledge of machine learning concepts and techniques, including supervised and unsupervised learning, neural networks, and deep learning.
 



 • Expertise in TensorFlow and Scikit\\-learn, with experience in developing and deploying machine learning models.
 



 • Strong understanding of data preprocessing, including data cleaning, transformation, and feature engineering.
 



 • Excellent collaboration and communication skills, with experience working with cross\\-functional teams.
 



 • Strong analytical and problem\\-solving skills, with the ability to analyze complex data sets and identify trends and patterns.
 



  





**More About the Opportunity:** 




 This is a contract opportunity that requires a high level of technical expertise and experience in machine learning. Applicants will be reviewed based on their skills and qualifications, and selected candidates will have the opportunity to work with a global leader in the AI industry.
 



  





**Equal Opportunity Employer:** 




 We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications.
 



  





**Apply Now!**

title: Senior Engineer
description:
**Company Description**

 Engineer Department is a government administration organization located in Delphos, Ohio, United States. The department focuses on infrastructure, development, and engineering services to support community growth and sustainability. As a government body, it is dedicated to innovation, safety, and efficiency in all its projects. The Engineer Department provides a professional environment, fostering the development of engineers who are committed to creating impactful solutions for the community.
   




**Role Description**

 This is a full\\-time on\\-site role for a Senior Engineer, based in New Delhi. The Senior Engineer will be responsible for designing, overseeing, and implementing engineering projects, ensuring compliance with standards and regulations. The role involves project management, coordinating with cross\\-functional teams, analyzing technical issues, and delivering timely solutions. The Senior Engineer will also provide guidance to junior engineers, prepare technical reports, and contribute to long\\-term strategic planning for the department.
   




**Qualifications**
* Strong technical expertise in structural, civil, or mechanical engineering principles
* Proficiency in design tools and software, such as AutoCAD or similar
* Experience in project management, including resource allocation and meeting deadlines
* Excellent problem\\-solving, analytical, and decision\\-making abilities
* Strong written and verbal communication skills, including report preparation
* Ability to lead, mentor, and collaborate with cross\\-functional teams effectively
* Familiarity with local, state, and national engineering regulations and compliance standards
* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Engineering (Civil, Mechanical, or related field)
* Professional Engineer (PE) license or equivalent certification is preferred
* Experience in public\\-sector engineering projects is a plus

* LangChain
